name: Toro y Moi
description: '''Chaz Bear''' (born '''Chazwick Bradley Bundick'''; November 7, 1986), known professionally as '''Toro y Moi''', is an American singer, songwriter, record producer, and graphic designer. He is regarded as a pioneer of the [[chillwave]] genre that emerged in the late [[2000s]] and early [[2010s]], alongside artists such as [[Washed Out]] and [[Neon Indian]], though his music has since incorporated a wide range of styles. His stage name is a [[multilingualism|multilingual]] phrase combining the [[Spanish language|Spanish]] words "''toro'' ''y"'' ("bull and") and the [[French language|French]] word ''moi'' (“me").
